narrative: Cooked-meat HACCP CCP-1 (thermal kill step). Critical limit: cook ≥71.1°C/15 seconds. Monitoring shows internal temperature 73.4°C for 21 seconds — within limits, critical limit met. Calibrated thermocouple verified against ice-slurry 32°F yesterday; calibration record on file. No deviation; no corrective action required. Verification record signed by QA within 7 days. CCP-2 (cold storage) holding at 38°F, below 41°F threshold. All hazard analysis steps current; reanalysis on schedule. Batch released.
